'''ngokapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zigzaggy|zigzaggy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zigzaggy|zigzaggy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngokapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngokapithi|ngokapithi]] || [[word:ngokapiji|ngokapiji]] || [[word:ngokapishi|ngokapishi]] || [[word:ngokapiki|ngokapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngokaputhuthu|ngokaputhuthu]] || [[word:ngokapujuju|ngokapujuju]] || [[word:ngokapushushu|ngokapushushu]] || [[word:ngokapukuku|ngokapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngokaputhu|ngokaputhu]] || [[word:ngokapuju|ngokapuju]] || [[word:ngokapushu|ngokapushu]] || [[word:ngokapuku|ngokapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngokapufthuf|ngokapufthuf]] || [[word:ngokapufjuf|ngokapufjuf]] || [[word:ngokapufshuf|ngokapufshuf]] || [[word:ngokapufkuf|ngokapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngokapethe|ngokapethe]] || [[word:ngokapeje|ngokapeje]] || [[word:ngokapeshe|ngokapeshe]] || [[word:ngokapeke|ngokapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngokapothotho|ngokapothotho]] || [[word:ngokapojojo|ngokapojojo]] || [[word:ngokaposhosho|ngokaposhosho]] || [[word:ngokapokoko|ngokapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngokapotho|ngokapotho]] || [[word:ngokapojo|ngokapojo]] || [[word:ngokaposho|ngokaposho]] || [[word:ngokapoko|ngokapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngokapofthof|ngokapofthof]] || [[word:ngokapofjof|ngokapofjof]] || [[word:ngokapofshof|ngokapofshof]] || [[word:ngokapofkof|ngokapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfthĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfjĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfshĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfkĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfthĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfjĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfshĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfkĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfthĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfjĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfshĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngokapĂŻfkĂŻf|ngokapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngokapĂŠthĂŠ|ngokapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngokapĂŠjĂŠ|ngokapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngokapĂŠshĂŠ|ngokapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngokapĂŠkĂŠ|ngokapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngokapathatha|ngokapathatha]] || [[word:ngokapajaja|ngokapajaja]] || [[word:ngokapashasha|ngokapashasha]] || [[word:ngokapakaka|ngokapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngokapatha|ngokapatha]] || [[word:ngokapaja|ngokapaja]] || [[word:ngokapasha|ngokapasha]] || [[word:ngokapaka|ngokapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngokapafthaf|ngokapafthaf]] || [[word:ngokapafjaf|ngokapafjaf]] || [[word:ngokapafshaf|ngokapafshaf]] || [[word:ngokapafkaf|ngokapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngokapasha|ngokapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngokapshĂ«sha|ngokapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngokaprosha|ngokaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngokapmusha|ngokapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngokapyasha|ngokapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongokapnkshĂ«sha|gongokapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongokapnkrosha|gongokapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongokapnkmusha|gongokapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongokapnkyasha|gongokapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngokakapasha|ngokakapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngokakapshĂ«sha|ngokakapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngokakaprosha|ngokakaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngokakapmusha|ngokakapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngokakapyasha|ngokakapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongokakapnkshĂ«sha|gongokakapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongokakapnkrosha|gongokakapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongokakapnkmusha|gongokakapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongokakapnkyasha|gongokakapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngekĂŠpasha|ngekĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngekĂŠpshĂ«sha|ngekĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngekĂŠprosha|ngekĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngekĂŠpmusha|ngekĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngekĂŠpyasha|ngekĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongekĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|gongekĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongekĂŠpnkrosha|gongekĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongekĂŠpnkmusha|gongekĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongekĂŠpnkyasha|gongekĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngokfapasha|ngokfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngokfapshĂ«sha|ngokfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngokfaprosha|ngokfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngokfapmusha|ngokfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngokfapyasha|ngokfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongokfapnkshĂ«sha|gongokfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongokfapnkrosha|gongokfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongokfapnkmusha|gongokfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongokfapnkyasha|gongokfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
